    <item>
        <guid>nba529584</guid>
        <title>Jalen Brunson: Leads Knicks in Game 1</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-brunson-4405</link>
        <description>Brunson logged 28 points (9-22 FG, 3-4 3Pt, 7-8 FT), seven assists, five rebounds and one steal in 36 minutes of Saturday's 113-102 Game 1 win over the Hawks.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 5:56:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529576</guid>
        <title>Kevin Durant: Won't play in Game 1</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/kevin-durant-2811</link>
        <description>Durant (knee) has been ruled out for Saturday's Game 1 against the Lakers, Brett Siegel of ClutchPoints.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 4:12:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529574</guid>
        <title>Anthony Edwards: Nets 22 points with full line</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/anthony-edwards-5110</link>
        <description>Edwards logged 22 points (7-19 FG, 2-9 3Pt, 6-7 FT), nine rebounds, seven assists and three blocks over 38 minutes during Saturday's 116-105 loss to the Nuggets in Game 1 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 4:09:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529571</guid>
        <title>Nikola Jokic: Triple-doubles in Game 1 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/nikola-jokic-3612</link>
        <description>Jokic supplied 25 points (11-19 FG, 2-7 3Pt, 1-1 FT), 13 rebounds, 11 assists and one steal across 40 minutes during Saturday's 116-105 win over Minnesota in Game 1 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 4:08:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529570</guid>
        <title>Jamal Murray: Nets game-high 30 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jamal-murray-3882</link>
        <description>Murray recorded 30 points (7-22 FG, 0-8 3Pt, 16-16 FT), five rebounds and seven assists across 39 minutes during Saturday's 116-105 victory over the Timberwolves in Game 1 of the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 4:07:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
